description: Product Description Reusable EVA poncho for adults to keep you dry and nice in the rain! Adjustable Hood with Drawstring The drawstring helps you adjust the hood to fit your head perfectly. The integrated drawstring hood helps keep the hood in place and protects your head, face and neck in wind and rain. Lightweight and Waterproof Material The travel raincoat is made of EVA material, non-toxic, odorless and tear-resistant. This raincoat is lightweight, waterproof and quick-drying, extremely wear-resistant and reusable. Sleeves with buttons The sleeves of the rain cape are buttoned for easy on and off. Snaps on both sides prevent the rain cape from blowing away in windy weather, providing full coverage. It also allows air to circulate, so you don't have to worry about overheating.
